## Property Descriptions

<a id="class-bpm-spinner-property-spinner"></a>

`Control` **Spinner** = `<unknown>` [🔗](#class-bpm-spinner-property-spinner)

Visual BPM spinner used by active track cards Shows current BPM plus percentage offset from base BPM

## Method Descriptions

<a id="class-bpm-spinner-private-method-ready"></a>

 **\_ready**() [🔗](#class-bpm-spinner-private-method-ready)

Initialises spinner material instance

---

<a id="class-bpm-spinner-private-method-process"></a>

 **\_process**(delta: `float`) [🔗](#class-bpm-spinner-private-method-process)

Refreshes spinner angle and BPM/offset labels

---

<a id="class-bpm-spinner-method-rotate-spinny"></a>

 **rotate_spinny**(new_alpha: `float`) [🔗](#class-bpm-spinner-method-rotate-spinny)

Rotates spinner around one full cycle using alpha (0…1)

---

<a id="class-bpm-spinner-method-on-beat"></a>

 **On_Beat**() [🔗](#class-bpm-spinner-method-on-beat)

Called when a beat has just occurred (alpha reached 1 and wrapped to 0)… Use for visual feedback (e.g. pulse)

---

<a id="class-bpm-spinner-method-set-base-bpm"></a>

 **Set_Base_BPM**(New_Base_BPM: `float`) [🔗](#class-bpm-spinner-method-set-base-bpm)

Sets metadata/base BPM reference for offset

---

<a id="class-bpm-spinner-method-refresh-bpm"></a>

 **Refresh_BPM**(New_Current_BPM: `float`) [🔗](#class-bpm-spinner-method-refresh-bpm)

Sets currently effective deck BPM
